creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
gtk20  build will fail due to recent gettext update:

/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libintl.so.8" not found, required by "libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0"
Command '['/usr/obj/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20/work/gtk+-2.20.1/gdk/tmp-introspectYBkDNS/Gdk-2.0', '--introspect-dump=/usr/obj/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20/work/gtk+-2.20.1/gdk/tmp-introspectYBkDNS/types.txt,/usr/obj/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20/work/gtk+-2.20.1/gdk/tmp-introspectYBkDNS/dump.xml']' returned non-zero exit status 1
gmake[4]: *** [Gdk-2.0.gir] Błąd 1

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/obj/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/gtk20/
make build
